Pull requests should normally have an existing issue before implementation begins. Small typo corrections and obvious documentation fixes are exceptions.

## Final checklist

- [ ] My changes are focused on one issue or purpose.
- [ ] I reviewed my own changes.
- [ ] I did not include unrelated formatting or generated files.
- [ ] Existing functionality continues to work.
- [ ] User-facing text is clear and accurate.
- [ ] I am ready to respond to review feedback.
